SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Plaintiff David Grassi, dba Professional Concrete Work appearing on his own behalf.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Nils Weliin, and individual.
Plaintiff David Grassi sworn and examined on his own behalf.
Does 1-20 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.
The following exhibits were introduced by the Plaintiff and marked as follows:
No Exhibit 1 was marked.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2. Proposal 2 page document dated 5/6/12. Id/Evidence.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 3. Exclusions 5 Page document, Note Change Order, paragraph 24 last page initials by owner. Id/Evidence.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 4. Extra Work Order 9/12/12 Id/Evidence.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 5. Extra Work Order 9/16/2012 Id/Evidence.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 6. Letter of Clarification dated 10/4/12 Id/Evidence.
No Exhibits 7, 8, and 9 were marked.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 10. Extra Work Order 10/13/12 Id/Evidence.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of David Grassi, dba Professional Concrete Work and against Defendant Nils Wellin, an individual.
Principal $10,700.00
Costs $ by Memorandum of Cost to be filed within 10 days.
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,700,00
Judgment signed in open court.
Court ordered Original exhibits returned to Plaintiff or the care and custody of the court.
Court adjourned.
